description: Small, language-diverse semantic-query regression subset (issue #37). Repos are pinned corpus ids under repos_root (populated by bench/setup_repos.sh). Kept small and fast so the runtime baseline can be repeated many times without cache; swap in #36's recommended repos by editing `repos`.

source.selection: one repo per supported imperative corpus language (go, python, typescript, c, rust, ruby, java, swift) plus a second small Go repo for cross-file families; all single-pass semantic queries are intended to stay sub-second so the no-cache repeats stay cheap.
source.frontier_link: liquid (ruby) and junit5 (java) are repos that appear in bench/type4/real_frontier.v1.json (#36), so this subset already overlaps the live Type-4 frontier; replace or extend `repos` with #36's next batch as it lands.
